findings.title: SSH Brute Force Attack Detected from 203.0.113.5
findings.description: IP 203.0.113.5 performed 12 failed SSH login attempts within a 5-minute sliding window.

findings.title: Potential Privilege Escalation: root executing sudo
findings.description: User "root" executed a command matching privilege escalation signature: "sudo".

timelineSummary: 12 failed password entries followed by root access compromise and backdoor wheel group modifications.
